title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain, founder of Glean, discusses his approach to building two unicorn companies in 12 years. He emphasizes that success comes from focused execution and differentiation through identifying gaps others are not addressing well, rather than from scaling model size or presentation.
